kanbanbot_prs.title: [KanbanBot] perf: replace transition: all with specific property transitions
[KanbanBot] test: add missing coverage for customTitle, cwd
[KanbanBot] a11y: set aria-selected on keyboard-selected task cards

pending_work.description: perf: abort in-flight fetchSessions (AbortController). In DATA_FETCHING region: add let _fetchSessionsCtrl=null before fetchSessions, replace try-block with abort/new-ctrl pattern, pass {signal} to both fetch calls, swallow AbortError. ~15 line change to public/app.js.

test: export extractCustomTitleFromText and getSystemMessageLabel from lib/parsers.js module.exports. Add 18 tests to test/contracts.test.js: 6 for extractCustomTitleFromText (no-marker, valid, HTML-like rejected, last-wins, malformed JSON, missing field) and 12 for getSystemMessageLabel (summary tag, trim, task-notification, local-command-stdout Compacted vs other, local-command-caveat, bg-task-completed, continuation __skip__, /clear __skip__, /compact Compacted, null for unknown). 97 total tests.

infrastructure_notes: safeoutputs MCP server filtered for 4+ consecutive runs. Error: Could not verify server against any configured registry. Branches are created locally each run but lost at runner shutdown. 6 open KanbanBot PRs (#31-#37) are 4+ weeks old with no maintainer review. Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates need issue discussion.
